CustomField.description: True when the FRA statutory clock is formally suspended. Under 42 U.S.C. 4336a, the clock may pause only when the project sponsor explicitly agrees in writing to a suspension. This flag blocks NEPA_SLA_Escalation_Monitor from marking the process overdue while the suspension is in effect.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Statutory clock suspended with project sponsor agreement. Pause requires documented sponsor consent — see nepa_clock_pause_reason__c.
CustomField.label: Statutory Clock Paused
